pageContext.name: Nightmare Before Christmas Chalice
pageContext.description: Disney Showcase Collection brings your favorite Disney characters and cinematic moments to life as never before. Our Disney dedicated employees, work with talented Disney artists, sculptors and painters to create intricately detailed Disney collectibles coveted by Disney enthusiasts around the world. The official chalice of Halloween Town, celebrate your holidays in style with this stainless steel lined decorative goblet adorned with frightful imagery from The Nightmare Before Christmas. 16 faux gems sparkle in the moonlight.
